title: Mayile Song Lyrics In Tamil | Moonwalk | AR Rahman | Prabhudeva
stanzas:
For my People in the back
For my people in the front
For my people on the left,
For my people on the right
For my people...

ini ellam kadakkum mayile
un dhairiyam meerattum mayile
nallaa manam vittu siruchiko mayile
life bayamilla bayamilla smile-le

For my people in the back,
For my people in the front,
For my people on the left,
For my people on the right.

For my people on the feet,
For my people on the street,
For my people on the beat,
For my people in the heat,

ini ellam kadakkum mayile
un dhairiyam meerattum mayile
nallaa manam vittu siruchiko mayile
life bayamilla bayamilla smile-le

asaraadhadaa un mayile
un santhosam un style-le
o mayile mayile mayile
ada ennaanaalum smile-lu
in santhosam un stylelu
o mayile un mayile
en mayile mayile mayile
o mayile mayile mayile mayile mayile
o mayile mayile mayile mayile mayile

You gonna find The people beside
Who are willing and waiting to see you smile
Kicking the troubles of past behind
Keep Looking for happiness deep inside
Everybody’s building a story
Staying happy is the key to glory
Try to live in the moment slowly
Living the life cool and happy
Oh Riyrara Riyrara Riyrara Riyrara
Riyra Riyra Riy Riy Riy
Oh Riyrara Riyrara Riyrara Riyrara
Riyra Riyra Riy Riy Riy

ini ellam kadakkum mayile
un dhairiyam meerattum mayile
nallaa manam vittu siruchiko mayile
life bayamilla bayamilla smile-le

o mayile en mayile
en mayile mayile mayile
o mayile mayile mayile mayile mayile
o mayile mayile mayile
ada ennaanaalum smile-lu

smile-le smile-le smileu smileu smile-le
smile-le smile-le smileu smileu smile-le

Started from the bottom
now we stepping to the top
and won’t even understand
how we pull this style.
Thinking in the mind of a winner
as we try to keep the smile (x2)

The sudden wave of happiness
Is nothing less than wondrous
It only brings the cheerfulness
I’m dancing cause I’m marvelous
Everybody feel the pulse
And You should stand up for yourself
No worries you feel limitless
That way you feel effortless
I got something to spread the laughter

seo.keywords: Manoj NS, Moonwalk, A.R.Rahman, ADK, Blaaze, Sri Rascol, Mayile full lyrics, Moonwalk songs lyrics, Mayile lyrics snippets, Mayile WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Mayile lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mayile?

Mayile conveys themes of courage and positivity, encouraging listeners to embrace life without fear.

What is the plot context of the movie Moonwalk?

Moonwalk explores themes of self-discovery and celebration, making Mayile a perfect fit for its narrative.

Who are the singers of Mayile?

The song features talented artists like ADK, Blaaze, and Sri Rascol.

Who composed the music for Mayile?

The music for Mayile is composed by the legendary A.R. Rahman.

When was Mayile released?

Mayile was released on January 25, 2026.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mayile, the vibrant energy of the song mirrors the celebratory essence of Moonwalk. The lyrics inspire listeners to embrace life with courage and positivity, making it a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations. With a blend of catchy beats and uplifting melodies, the song evokes feelings of joy and motivation. This track stands out as a testament to the collaborative brilliance of its artists, leaving a lasting impact on its audience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mayile from Moonwalk is an electrifying anthem that resonates with the spirit of celebration and unity. Featuring a unique collaboration of talents like ADK, Blaaze, and Sri Rascol, this track combines A.R. Rahman's innovative soundscapes with vibrant lyrics. Get ready to groove as the infectious beats and uplifting vibes take you on a joyful journey!
stanzaMeanings: For my people in the back, for my people in the front, for my people on the left, for my people on the right, for my people...
Now everything will be alright, your courage will shine, let go of your worries and smile, life has no fear, no fear, just smile.
For my people in the back, for my people in the front, for my people on the left, for my people on the right.
For my people on the feet, for my people on the street, for my people on the beat, for my people in the heat.
Now everything will be alright, your courage will shine, let go of your worries and smile, life has no fear, no fear, just smile.
Oh my dear, your happiness, your style, oh my dear, no matter what, just smile, your happiness, your style, oh my dear, my dear, my dear, oh my dear, my dear, my dear, my dear, my dear.

You will find the people beside you who are ready and waiting to see you smile, leaving the troubles of the past behind. Keep looking for happiness deep inside. Everyone is creating their own story. Staying happy is the key to success. Try to live in the moment slowly, living life cool and happy.
Now everything will be alright, your courage will shine, let go of your worries and smile, life has no fear, no fear, just smile.
Oh my dear, my dear, my dear, my dear, oh my dear, my dear, my dear, my dear, my dear, oh my dear, my dear, my dear, no matter what, just smile.
Just smile, just smile, smile, smile, just smile, just smile, just smile, smile, smile, just smile.
Started from the bottom, now we are stepping to the top and won’t even understand how we pulled this off. Thinking like a winner as we try to keep smiling.

The sudden wave of happiness is truly wonderful. It brings joy, and I’m dancing because I feel amazing. Everyone feel the rhythm, and you should stand up for yourself. No worries, you feel limitless, and that makes you feel effortless. I have something to spread laughter.
